title: callitris muelleri
intro: Callitris muelleri, also known as the mueller's cypress pine, is a species of coniferous tree native to eastern Australia. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Callitris muelleri include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Callitris muelleri can be made into teas, essential oils, or capsules, and are often used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues and skin infections.
